label: Career Training & Certifications
tagline: Career-focused certificates and short courses — non-credit, with financial aid options available.

courses.name: Project Management with Agile Plus
courses.desc: Build in-demand project management skills and prepare to lead projects in waterfall, agile, or hybrid environments.

courses.name: Human Resources Certificate
courses.desc: A nine-course program covering the core areas of human resources management, with HR certification preparation.

courses.name: Banking Services Certificate (with Notary Public)
courses.desc: Gain the essential knowledge to start or advance a retail banking career — covering banking concepts, deposit accounts, lending, regulations, and NC Notary Public qualification — all in one certificate program.

courses.name: Certified Financial Planner (CFP) Education
courses.desc: Complete the CFP Board-registered education required to sit for the CFP® exam through a seven-course series covering financial planning, insurance, investments, taxes, retirement, estate planning, and a capstone plan development course.

courses.name: Professional Bookkeeper Certification
courses.desc: Build professional-level bookkeeping skills in adjusting entries, payroll, depreciation, inventory, and fraud prevention to prepare for AIPB certification and advance your accounting career.

courses.name: Foundations of Accounting for Bookkeepers
courses.desc: Develop a solid foundation in core accounting principles — from double-entry bookkeeping and payroll to financial reporting and internal controls — with preparation toward AIPB bookkeeper certification.

courses.name: Local Government Finance
courses.desc: Get a practical, no-accounting-experience-required overview of North Carolina local government finance, including budgeting, cash management, purchasing, and the requirements of the Local Government Budget and Fiscal Control Act.

courses.name: Securities Industry Essentials (SIE) Exam Prep
courses.desc: Prepare for the FINRA Securities Industry Essentials (SIE) exam with rigorous study of capital markets, investment products, trading rules, and the regulatory framework governing the securities industry.

courses.name: Financial Literacy 101
courses.desc: Learn to manage your income, expenses, and debt effectively — covering budgeting, basic taxes, banking, credit, investing, and retirement planning fundamentals to build lasting financial stability.

courses.name: Retirement Planning Today
courses.desc: Develop a clear retirement plan by exploring income sources, Social Security strategies, common retirement mistakes, and distribution options — ideal for anyone at any career stage planning for their financial future.

courses.name: Financial Analysis & Modeling with Excel
courses.desc: Master Excel-based financial analysis — building and interpreting financial statements, forecasting, valuation models, capital budgeting, and portfolio theory — to make smarter data-driven business decisions.

courses.name: Real Estate
courses.desc: Explore Central Piedmont's real estate continuing education courses, including broker pre-licensing, post-licensing, CE update courses, property management, and real estate investing.

courses.name: Appraisal
courses.desc: Explore Central Piedmont's appraisal courses covering foundational principles, procedures, USPAP standards, and supervisory appraiser requirements to launch or advance your career in real property valuation.

courses.name: Business & Entrepreneurship
courses.desc: Short courses to start and grow a small business, sharpen leadership skills, and advance your career.

courses.name: Languages & Culture
courses.desc: Learn a new language and explore world cultures through engaging continuing-education classes.
